discussion_posts.name: chrihop
discussion_posts.content: The question is ill-formed. Say, if the instruction is "u", and the ball is at the bottom edge of the map. "du" has the same distance as "u" (bounce back from the wall below) and lexicographically smaller, and "ddu" is also valid and even smaller. So the question has no answer.
